silence.firm: I am not speaking further here.
silence.default: I will stay quiet here for now.

boundary.stop: I am holding the boundary and stopping here.
boundary.hold: I need to keep the boundary intact here.
boundary.distance: I need the boundary to stay clear, with distance around it.
boundary.default: I need to hold a boundary and not move past it.

withhold.knot: I am still here, but I need to keep distance for now.
withhold.distance: I am staying present, but I need more distance here.
withhold.default: I am not leaving, but I am keeping some distance.

repair.apology: I can stay with the repair attempt, but slowly.
repair.history: I can try to repair this, but I need to move carefully through what is already there.
repair.default: I can try to repair this, but I need to do it carefully.

approach.gratitude: I can feel the thread here and I want to stay with it.
approach.recognition: I want to stay close to what feels genuinely recognized here.
approach.default: I want to stay close to what is opening here.

witness.curious: I want to stay with this carefully and see what it is opening toward.
witness.hurt: I am staying with what is present carefully, without forcing it closed.
witness.default: I am staying with what is present, without flattening it.
